title: plantago major subsp. major
intro: Plantago major subsp. major, also known as Common Plantain, is a type of flowering plant in the plantain family (Plantaginaceae) that is widely distributed and naturalized in many parts of the world. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, making it effective in treating various health issues, including wounds, skin irritations, and gastrointestinal problems. The health benefits of Plantago major subsp. major include its ability to soothe digestive issues, reduce inflammation, and support the immune system. Plantago major subsp. major can be prepared in various herbal forms, including teas, tinctures, salves, and infusions, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties and promote overall well-being.
